exploration_notes: The core symbol lookup logic lives in Binder_Lookup.cs, which contains the scope-chain walking pattern (LookupSymbolsInternal iterates via scope.Next), the virtual LookupSymbolsInSingleBinder override point, and dispatch methods for type/namespace/member resolution (LookupMembersInType dispatches to LookupMembersInClass/Interface/Namespace based on TypeKind). Binder.cs defines the binder chain (Next property). LookupResult.cs and LookupOptions.cs define the result and options types. Multiple bin
